events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Lionel's Hits
angles.copy: From Commodores classics to solo anthems, Lionel Richie is 77 today! Which of his smooth hits is your all-time favourite?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Iconic American singer Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still rocking that unique style and those timeless anthems.

events.title: Remembering George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 63rd birthday of the legendary British singer-songwriter George Michael.

angles.name: George Michael Tribute
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael today, on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His music lives on.

events.title: 17 years since we lost Michael Jackson
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, the world lost Michael Jackson. His unparalleled artistry continues to inspire.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Sending him peace and love today.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Brian May
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Still rocking at 83! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger, a true icon of rock 'n' roll.

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: MTV launched 45 years ago today, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV hit our screens and changed music forever. Remember 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as the very first video?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago today.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! A game-changer for Britpop and still sounds as fresh as ever.

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began 57 years ago today.

angles.name: Peace and Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, Woodstock brought together half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. What a moment in history!

events.title: 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legend live on.

events.title: 30 years since the death of Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years. The impact of Tupac Shakur is still felt across music and culture today.

events.title: 56 years since the passing of Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the world lost the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Forever
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after his passing. A true guitar revolutionary.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago today.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years of 'Abbey Road'! The Beatles' timeless masterpiece still sounds incredible. Which track is your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are as powerful as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: As You Were, Liam
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon released his seminal album 'Imagine' 55 years ago today.

angles.name: Imagine Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us the powerful 'Imagine' album. Its message of peace and unity still resonates today.

events.title: The original iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple released the very first iPod 25 years ago today, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Nostalgia
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? The original iPod turns 25 today! It truly put '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British spy film franchise.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite 007 and what's the best Bond theme tune? Let us know!
